vibe: Cinematic, architectural, moody, and expensive. The photography spaces are the heroes, so the UI steps back to frame them elegantly.

typography.strategy: The 'Editorial Future' - Wide Display Sans for character, Geometric Body for legibility.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Lots of negative space to give it a gallery feel.

grid_strategy.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12 (Tetris Grid for asymmetry)
grid_strategy.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 (Control Room Grid)

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px) for a sharp, architectural look.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat solid background (#121214), 1px solid border-white/10, no shadow by default. Hover: -translate-y-1, border-white/20, shadow-2xl shadow-black/50.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0B] border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#E5D0B3] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E5D0B3] rounded-sm

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in with slight upward translation (framer-motion)

image_urls.description: Camera studio setup with dramatic lighting
Technical rig and ceiling lighting setup
Dark desk setup with a lamp

components.shadcn_usage: Use heavily customized Shadcn components for Forms, Modals, Inputs, DatePicker, Select, and Dashboards. Strip Vercel-look by setting sharp borders (rounded-none or rounded-sm) and dark mode colors.
components.buttons: Solid primary color for primary actions (#E5D0B3 text-black), stark white borders for secondary actions.
components.navigation: Sticky header with Crystal Glass effect. Links must be visible on desktop (no hamburger menu for desktop).
components.cards: Do not overuse standard cards on marketing pages; use purely HTML+Tailwind for asymmetrical bento layouts.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Use text-shadow over images. Hover state must explicitly define text color.
accessibility.data_testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use .js or .jsx file extensions for React components. DO NOT use .tsx.
Implement the 'Luxury' archetype: deep charcoal backgrounds (#0A0A0B) with Champagne accents (#E5D0B3) and stark white text (#FAFAFA).
The Hero section image must have a max overlay of bg-black/50, or a gradient overlay for text readability without killing the image.
Build a hybrid_fullstack app featuring a marketing landing page, studio browsing gallery, booking flow, user bookings view, and an admin dashboard.
Admin dashboard should follow the 'Control Room Grid' pattern, avoiding pure black backgrounds. Use dark gray (#121214) with subtle borders.
Integrate lucide-react for all icons, keeping them minimal and stroke-based.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, form inputs, and key UI elements.
